name: tpl-real-estate-listing
description: Real estate listing activation: draft copy, submit to MLS, publish social posts, notify client

steps.prompt: Create listing content for the property at {{address}}. Property details: ${{price}}, {{bedrooms}} bed / {{bathrooms}} bath, {{sqft}} sq ft. Key features: {{key_features}}. Listing agent: {{agent_name}}. Produce three outputs: (1) MLS Public Remarks (500 chars max) — compelling buyer-facing description, lead with the strongest feature, close with a call to action; (2) Agent Remarks (internal MLS field, 500 chars max) — showing instructions, lockbox info placeholder, offer instructions; (3) Three social media posts — one for Instagram (visual, emoji-friendly, 3 hashtags), one for Facebook (conversational, neighborhood focus), one for LinkedIn (professional, investment angle). Return as structured JSON with keys: mls_remarks, agent_remarks, social_instagram, social_facebook, social_linkedin.

steps.notifyMsg: MLS submission failed for {{address}}. Error: {{steps.submit-mls.output.error}}. MLS listing ID attempted: {{steps.submit-mls.output.listing_id}}. Manual review required.

steps.prompt: The listing for {{client_name}}'s property at {{address}} is now live on MLS. MLS listing ID: {{steps.submit-mls.output.listing_id}}. MLS link: {{steps.submit-mls.output.listing_url}}. Social posts published: {{steps.publish-social.output.published_count}} platforms. Write a warm, personalized 'Your home is live!' message to {{client_name}} from agent {{agent_name}}. Include: (1) congratulations on going live, (2) MLS link, (3) what happens next (showings process, offer timeline expectations), (4) how to reach the agent with questions. Tone: excited but professional.
